svg.title: Food delivery ecosystem relationship diagram
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing all business actors in food delivery platforms and their relationships

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about end consumers in food delivery')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about corporate B2B accounts in food delivery')
sendPrompt('How do influencers and affiliates drive demand for food delivery?')
sendPrompt('How does the marketplace platform work in food delivery?')
sendPrompt('What do KAMs do in food delivery platforms?')
sendPrompt('What do sales hunter teams do in food delivery?')
sendPrompt('How does ad/media sales work on food delivery platforms?')
sendPrompt('How do food delivery platforms handle customer support?')
sendPrompt('How do restaurants partner with food delivery platforms?')
sendPrompt('How do grocery and convenience stores work in delivery apps?')
sendPrompt('How do CPG brands participate in food delivery platforms?')
sendPrompt('What role do cloud kitchen operators play?')
sendPrompt('How do delivery couriers work in food delivery?')
sendPrompt('How do third-party fleet partners work in delivery?')
sendPrompt('How do payment processors work in food delivery?')
sendPrompt('How do POS integrators work in food delivery?')
sendPrompt('How do mapping providers support food delivery?')
sendPrompt('What role does insurance play in food delivery?')
sendPrompt('How do packaging vendors serve the food delivery ecosystem?')
sendPrompt('How do analytics vendors serve food delivery platforms?')
sendPrompt('How do regulators affect food delivery platforms?')
sendPrompt('What industry associations exist in food delivery?')
sendPrompt('How do loyalty and subscription programs work in food delivery?')
